diagrams.title: Loop Control Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows flow of execution through a for loop with break and continue paths
elements: Start → Initialize → Condition Check → [True: Body → Update → Condition] → [False: End]
Body contains: Execute Code → (break exits to End) → (continue jumps to Update)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how break exits loop and continue skips to next iteration

diagrams.title: While vs Do-While Flow Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of pre-test and post-test loop behavior
diagrams.purpose: Understand that do-while always executes body at least once

diagrams.title: Nested Loop Iteration Order
diagrams.description: Shows execution order for nested loops with i=0,1 and j=0,1,2
elements: Outer i=0: Inner j=0 → j=1 → j=2
Outer i=1: Inner j=0 → j=1 → j=2
diagrams.purpose: Understand how nested loops execute sequentially, outer loop drives inner loop resets
